description: SIX Hews of East Hartfords Men And Women in The Armed Forces J A mA WoWKKBRt 1 RB k WRy ill w w A wMf J Hs HW SEAMAN MICHAEL ROUSH Seaman First Class Michael Roush is the son of Mr and Mrs Frank Roush of 39 Garden Street But 18 years old this Na val lad has already made two crossings and at the present time is at sea SeamanRoush don ned the blue of the Navy when but 17 years old on July 23 1943 He attended East Hartford High School and left to enter the ser vice receiving his training with the Naval Armed Guard at New port Rhode Island He spent a recent leave with his parents fol lowing a trip to Naples Italy At high school he was prominent in track as well as basketball His brother Frank Roush Jr is with the Army Air Corps MAJOR MAURICE MONETTE A man who has served shoul der to shoulder with General Douglas MacArthur and thinks he is one of the greatest men ev er is Major Maurice Monette soninlaw of Mr and Mrs John Glaser of 51 Daniels Street Ma jor Monette was married to the
